Varg<>rtama: The theory of Vargottama is supreme and its virtues
are enonnous. As for Raja Yoga either the ascendant or the Moon must
be Vargottama. Mostly all accomplished top politidans have either their
ascendant or their Moon Vargottama. This is a great advantage.
Vargottama planets wield supreme power, especially the lords of Kendra
and trikona, if they are posited in either Kendra or trikona; this takes
the person to the seat of power in the country. Vargottama ascendant.
the Moon or the planets are to be given A·l rank. The person who has

texts say that three or four benefics, aspecting Vargottama ascendant
or the Moon, make sueh a native king, or now-a-days equal to king with
prfvilege and power to rule the country.
